description: Update ARCHITECTURE.md to document the advanced error handling strategy (specific error types, retry policies on all tasks), observability improvements (Lambda X-Ray, CloudWatch Alarms, structured logging, optional Dashboard), and update the Mermaid diagram to show retry/error flows and observability components.
steps: Step 1 - In ARCHITECTURE.md, update the 'Implemented Components' table to reflect: Lambda now has X-Ray tracing enabled; ProcessAudio and PollyTask now have retry policies; Catch blocks use specific error types.

Step 2 - In ARCHITECTURE.md, add or expand an 'Error Handling Strategy' subsection under the Orchestration Layer documenting: (a) specific error types caught (Lambda.ServiceException, Lambda.AWSLambdaException, Lambda.SdkClientException, States.TaskFailed, Polly.ServiceException), (b) retry policies on all tasks with their configurations, (c) the fallback pattern (specific catches first, States.ALL as final fallback).

Step 3 - In ARCHITECTURE.md, update the 'Observability' section to document: (a) Lambda X-Ray tracing enabled, (b) structured JSON logging format in Lambda, (c) CloudWatch Alarms for ExecutionsFailed and Lambda Errors with their thresholds, (d) optional CloudWatch Dashboard.

Step 4 - Update the Mermaid diagram to show: retry annotations on ProcessAudio and PollyTask, CloudWatch Alarms component connected to the state machine and Lambda, and the structured logging flow from Lambda to CloudWatch Logs.
acceptance_criteria: ARCHITECTURE.md contains documentation of specific error types in Catch blocks
ARCHITECTURE.md documents retry policies on ProcessAudio and PollyTask
ARCHITECTURE.md documents Lambda X-Ray tracing and structured JSON logging
ARCHITECTURE.md documents CloudWatch Alarms with their metric/threshold configuration
Mermaid diagram shows observability components (Alarms, X-Ray) and retry annotations
verification: Read ARCHITECTURE.md and verify it contains sections on advanced error handling, retry policies for ProcessAudio/PollyTask, Lambda X-Ray, structured logging, and CloudWatch Alarms
Verify the Mermaid diagram is valid and includes retry/alarm annotations
findings: Documentation-only change. Updated all four sections as specified: Implemented Components table, Error Handling Strategy subsection, Observability section, and Current State Diagram with retry annotations and CloudWatch Alarms connections.
